faqs.question: What pests are most common in Lake Success, NY?
faqs.answer: Lake Success properties commonly encounter ants, cockroaches, spiders, mice, rats, wasps, and occasional invaders like silverfish and centipedes. Our general pest control service addresses all these pests with comprehensive treatment plans tailored to your specific situation.

faqs.answer: Our general pest control services in Lake Success range from $175 to $300, depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes with no hidden fees before starting any work.
